Document:
# Rule 5 — No Cheating or Exploiting
The use of any external tools, software, or game exploits to gain an unfair advantage is strictly prohibited.
This includes: - Cheat clients or modified game files - Macros that automate in-game actions - Exploiting bugs or unintended game mechanics to gain an advantage - Using multiple accounts to bypass bans or gain additional resources (ban evasion) - Sharing accounts with other players
If you discover a bug or exploit, report it via ahelp rather than abusing it.
Violations of this rule are a permanent ban offense with no appeal.
